claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T007_S022_PRE_01 ("I think a lot of people are interested in what is the equivalent of this step...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T011_S026_BLO_01 ("And I should tell you right now, nobody has done this, okay? But build a mode...").
first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The predicted future state contains a mechanism that removes the named blocker; the prediction is therefore a market signal for the resolution mechanism.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker frames the prediction (snippet S022) and the blocker (snippet S026) as independent statements; the resolution link is asserted by the analogy engine.
why_potentially_useful: Predictions that resolve known blockers are higher-value than predictions that simply extrapolate trends — they imply an unaddressed market need.
